rss.title: Artemis II leaves Earth's orbit on track for far side of the Moon
rss.snippet: The mission's last, big push on its lunar journey takes humans out of the Earth's orbit for the first time since 1972.

rss.title: 'Trust us, you look amazing': Artemis II astronauts speak from space
rss.snippet: The crew on board the Artemis II spoke by video link, sharing messages for their families and experiences of the trip so far.

rss.title: Why isn't Artemis II landing on the Moon?
rss.snippet: The US is aiming to be the first country to land humans on the lunar surface again by 2028 - so what's this mission for?
